ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_link" TEXT /* Link to the game's page */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "peak_players" INTEGER /* Peak number of concurrent players */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews */,
  "rating" REAL /* Percentage of positive reviews */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the game */,
  "is_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the game supports multiplayer */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary or description of the game */,
  "average_playtime" INTEGER /* Average playtime of the game */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the genre was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the genre record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the platform's icon */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the platform record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-genre association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-platform association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was released on the specific platform */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is positive or negative */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the review has been edited */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, developer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement record */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of players on that date */,
  "peak_players" INTEGER /* Peak number of concurrent players on that date */,
  "average_playtime" INTEGER /* Average playtime of players on that date */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of players on that date */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been downloaded */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Additional patch notes for the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the game */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
